content: PMC daily update formulas (Banister impulse-response): CTL(t) = CTL(t-1) * exp(-1/42) + TSS(t) * (1 - exp(-1/42)); ATL(t) = ATL(t-1) * exp(-1/7) + TSS(t) * (1 - exp(-1/7)); TSB(t) = CTL(t-1) - ATL(t-1) (yesterday's values). Decay constants: CTL tau=42 days (fitness), ATL tau=7 days (fatigue). TSS=0 on rest days still applies decay. Start CTL=ATL=0. Update triggers: after any session TSS is computed, recalculate forward from that date. Adaptive re-plan should evaluate TSB: TSB < -30 means excessive fatigue; TSB > +25 means detraining.
